description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a robust, angular design and a predominantly blue and black color scheme. The cabinet features a large, flat display screen at the top, framed by a blue bezel, and currently shows a video game scene. Below the screen is a control panel with visible buttons and a joystick, designed for player interaction, and a coin slot mechanism is present on the front. The lower front panel displays a red dragon graphic and the word 'CLANBURN' in bold white letters. The side panels are blue with some text and minor wear, and the base is solid black, providing stability. The overall construction appears to be a combination of painted wood or MDF, metal, and plastic, typical of arcade machines found in urban entertainment venues.
description: A blue and black upright arcade game cabinet with a large flat screen, control panel, coin slot, and dragon-themed artwork on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen, control panel, coin slot, and prominent dragon artwork.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular profile, blue side panel with text, and the depth of the screen and control area.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back structure and the depth of the cabinet, with less detail on controls or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible text and the cabinet's angular design.
attribute_screen_type: LCD, flat, large rectangular with a blue bezel and visible screen content
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a joystick and several buttons, arranged in a compact cluster, with a black and blue color scheme
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present, with a blue frame and a video game scene displayed; no distinct static artwork or text visible above the screen
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Blue panels with some text and minor wear; no large artwork or themed graphics visible
